steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is B, $x^3(7x^2 - 5x + 9)$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

steps.title: Factor the expression
steps.content: The GCF is $x^3$. Factor it out:$$7x^5-5x^4+9x^3=x^3(7x^2-5x+9)$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content: The factored form is $x^3(7x^2-5x+9)$. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
